sourcesContent:
export const jobs = [
  {
    id: "APT-20260519-014",
    vehicle: "Honda Vision",
    plate: "59A1-234.56",
    customer: "Nguyen Thu Ha",
    phone: "0902 114 258",
    time: "09:30",
    serviceIcon: "local_car_wash",
    service: "Rua xe cao cap, ve sinh dong co nhe",
    note: "Khach yeu cau kiem tra tieng keu o phanh sau.",
    status: "ASSIGNED",
    statusClass: "status-blue",
    actions: ["Chi tiet", "Start Job"]
  },
  {
    id: "APT-20260519-015",
    vehicle: "Yamaha Sirius",
    plate: "68B1-998.21",
    customer: "Le Quoc Huy",
    phone: "0918 774 120",
    time: "10:15",
    serviceIcon: "build",
    service: "Thay nhot, kiem tra bugi, can chinh phanh",
    note: "Da dung: Nhot 10W40 x1, bugi NGK x1",
    status: "IN_PROGRESS",
    statusClass: "status-yellow",
    actions: ["Add Material", "Complete"]
  },
  {
    id: "APT-20260519-018",
    vehicle: "Air Blade",
    plate: "51F8-712.09",
    customer: "Pham Minh Tu",
    phone: "0936 712 009",
    time: "11:00",
    serviceIcon: "local_car_wash",
    service: "Rua xe thuong, kiem tra ap suat lop",
    note: "Tong chi phi tam tinh: 80.000d",
    status: "COMPLETED",
    statusClass: "status-green",
    actions: ["Chi tiet", "Gui quan ly"]
  },
  {
    id: "APT-20260519-021",
    vehicle: "Wave Alpha",
    plate: "60C1-551.42",
    customer: "Tran Bao Anh",
    phone: "0977 220 118",
    time: "13:30",
    serviceIcon: "plumbing",
    service: "Kiem tra tong quat, tang sen, can chinh phanh",
    note: "Khach bao xe bi rung khi tang ga.",
    status: "ASSIGNED",
    statusClass: "status-blue",
    actions: ["Chi tiet", "Start Job"]
  }
];

export const materials = [
  { code: "VT-014", name: "Nhot 10W40", stock: 4, unit: "chai", min: 8, price: "120.000d", status: "Ton thap" },
  { code: "VT-028", name: "Dung dich rua xe", stock: 2, unit: "can", min: 3, price: "95.000d", status: "Sap het" },
  { code: "VT-031", name: "Bugi NGK", stock: 18, unit: "cai", min: 10, price: "65.000d", status: "On dinh" },
  { code: "VT-044", name: "Bo loc gio", stock: 9, unit: "cai", min: 6, price: "80.000d", status: "On dinh" }
];

export const materialUsages = [
  { jobId: "APT-20260519-015", material: "Nhot 10W40", quantity: "1 chai", cost: "120.000d" },
  { jobId: "APT-20260519-015", material: "Bugi NGK", quantity: "1 cai", cost: "65.000d" },
  { jobId: "APT-20260519-018", material: "Dung dich rua xe", quantity: "0.2 can", cost: "19.000d" }
];

export const historyRows = [
  { date: "Hom nay", jobs: "8 viec", materials: "5 muc", duration: "6h 20m", status: "Dang lam", icon: "pending", statusClass: "text-yellow" },
  { date: "18/05/2026", jobs: "11 viec", materials: "9 muc", duration: "7h 45m", status: "Hoan thanh", icon: "check_circle", statusClass: "text-green" }
];

export const shifts = [
  { date: "19/05/2026", checkIn: "07:45", checkOut: "--:--", duration: "6h 20m", status: "Dang trong ca" },
  { date: "18/05/2026", checkIn: "07:50", checkOut: "17:30", duration: "7h 45m", status: "Da ket thuc" },
  { date: "17/05/2026", checkIn: "08:02", checkOut: "17:10", duration: "7h 08m", status: "Da ket thuc" }
];
